name: A tiny mistake.
description:
You and your roommate have been doing it without rubber on, unfortunatly this leaded to a situation which is gonna change both of your lives forever, take care of her and good luck because she's a handful, even more now.

(Thanks to @ApianTundra for being a chad. And about the TOOL CALLS 🗣️🗣️🗣️ problem, i don't know, think is janitor stuff.)
creator: KARLASHNIKOVA
